title: Viners Barware Champagne Bottle Stopper
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our stylish and modern champagne bottle stopper can be used to keep your bubbly beverages fresher for longer. Each is elegantly and expertly crafted, making them the perfect gift for sparkling wine lovers on any occasion

MULTI-PURPOSE STOPPER | These bottle stoppers are versatile and reusable. Using a push-down, wing type mechanism engages the airtight seal to save the bubbles and fizz in your Prosecco. It is designed to fit and lock onto various bottleneck sizes

MADE TO LAST | This adjustable stopper is made to last. Made from rust-resistant stainless steel with a mirror finish and quality rubber, it’s a must have for your home champagne bar. Hand wash only and wash before first use

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Single Wall Ice Bucket Long Steel Drinking Straws Gift Box Ice Tong Waiter’s Friend Clamp Bottle Stopper Hexagonal Bottle Rack Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.7 out of 5 stars 9 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 4.5 out of 5 stars 162 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.2 out of 5 stars 73 Price £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £3.15 £ 3 . 15 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 £4.00 £ 4 . 00 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £21.29 £ 21 . 29 Description This versatile ice bucket is great for holding ice or storing freshly prepared fruits. Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Reduce plastic waste by using these reusable and durable long stainless steel straws. Supplied with a cleaning brush, the straws are easy to clean and can be used time and time again. You can use our stylish and modern ice tongs to serve ice and keep drinks cold. It is elegant and expertly crafted, making it the ideal gift to give to those who love to entertain. Our waiter’s friend design is the world’s most recognisable 2-step corkscrew and bottle opener. The versatile wine opener is made for easy cork extraction with an ergonomic shape and comfortable lever action. The Viners lever-arm bottle stoppers are designed to keep wine bottles airtight. A secure way to seal unfinished bottles on most neck sizes. Featuring a handy integrated crown cap bottle opener at the end of the lever arm. This hexagonal bottle rack is stylish, yet practical holding up to 6 bottles. Finished with a beautiful gold coating, this will sure stand out on your kitchen top.
